name: Slide Down
description: New page enters from above while the current page exits downward. Great for dropdown-style navigation or revealing content from the top.
demoAnimations: @keyframes slide-down-out { from { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateY(40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes slide-down-in { from { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } .slide-down-out { animation: slide-down-out 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; } .slide-down-in { animation: slide-down-in 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; }

transitions/slide-down/link.tsx
